entries.source: "Ask a teacher for help"
entries.value: "Humingi ng tulong sa guro"

entries.source: "Handle a rude customer"
entries.value: "Harapin ang isang rude customer"

entries.source: "Negotiate a deadline"
entries.value: "Makipag-negotiate ng isang deadline"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Roleplay Scenario on inspir for immersion learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Isang praktikal gabay sa gamit ang Roleplay Scenario sa inspir para sa immersion pag-aaral, kasama ang mga prompt, mga loop sa pag-aaral, at mas ligtas AI mga gawi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Isang mas malakas loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Umangkop ang session sa iyong layunin.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI na tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang small una hakbang rather kaysa isang huling sagot.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI suriin iyong pangangatwiran, hindi lang resulta.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish ng pagsusulat ang ideya likod mula sa memory.

entries.source: Immersion
entries.value: Imersyon

entries.source: Learners exploring immersion topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na nag-e-explore ng mga paksa ng imersyon na gustong makakuha ng praktikal na gabay sa halip na isang generic na answer box.

entries.source: Practice tough real-life conversations.
entries.value: Magsanay ng tough real-life conversations.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Mga prompt sa subukan

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario
entries.value: Senaryo ng Roleplay

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Magsanay ng negotiation, conflict, customer suporta, leadership, o anumang high-stakes conversation.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI: praktikal gabay

entries.source: Start the live mode at Roleplay Scenario. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Career Explorer. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Magsimula ang live mode at Roleplay Scenario. Kung ikaw gusto isang neighboring pag-aaral format, subukan Career Explorer. Para sa isang mas malawak view ng ang platform, Basahin ano isang AI katuwang sa pag-aaral dapat gawin para sa lahat.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Magsimula kasama ang mga halimbawang prompt.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Sabihin sa mode kung ano ang sinusubukan mong matutunan o mabuo.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Na difference shows up sa ang flow. Instead ng isa giant response, ang pinakamahusay mga session lumipat sa pamamagitan ng isang loop: set isang layunin, subukan something, get feedback, repair ang mahina spot, at pumili ang susunod action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Na pokus matters. Isang general chatbot Maaari bang sagot almost anything, pero isang pag-aaral mode gives ang conversation isang shape. Ito nudges ikaw toward ang kind ng thinking, pagsasanay, feedback, o exploration na tumutulong ang ideya stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ito ay ang same gawi behind studying kasama ang AI nang walang cheating yourself: keep ang mag-aaral aktibo. AI ay pinaka kapaki-pakinabang kapag ito gives ikaw feedback sa iyong thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ito mode ay especially kapaki-pakinabang para sa mga mag-aaral sino gusto sa:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for roleplay scenario with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Ang mode na ito ay nakatutok sa senaryo ng roleplay na may sarili nitong mga prompt, halimbawa, at daloy ng pagkatuto.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Subukan ang hakbang sa iyong own mga salita.

entries.source: Use Roleplay Scenario when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gamitin Roleplay Scenario Kapag ikaw gusto isang session na nagsisimula quickly pero pa rin umaangkop sa ikaw. Ang una layunin ay hindi sa tunog impressive. Ang una layunin ay gumawa ang susunod hakbang feel posible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Saan nakatutulong ang mode na ito

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Saan susunod

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ikaw Maaari bang also magsimula kasama ang isang magaspang version ng iyong totoo problema. Isang magulo una prompt ay fine. Ang session Maaari bang clarify ang antas, madla, deadline, at estilo once ikaw magsimula.
